mapper.select: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(AVG(total_current)::numeric, 1) AS total_current, ROUND(AVG(breaker_rating)::numeric, 1) AS breaker_rating, ROUND(AVG(voltage)::numeric, 1) AS voltage, ROUND(AVG(total_power)::numeric, 0) AS total_power, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ev_current), 0)::numeric, 1) AS ev_current, ROUND(GREATEST(AVG(total_current) - COALESCE(AVG(ev_current), 0), 0)::numeric, 1) AS home_current FROM ( SELECT time_bucket(CAST(#{bucketInterval} AS interval), h.time) AS bucket, h.total_current, h.breaker_rating, h.voltage, h.total_power, ( SELECT SUM(a.allocated_current) FROM nc_dlm_history_allocation a WHERE a.device_sn = h.device_sn AND a.time = h.time ) AS ev_current FROM nc_dlm_history h WHERE h.device_sn = #{deviceSn} AND h.time >= #{since} ) t GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
